## Severity

**How severely does this bug impact your usage?**

- [ ] **Critical** - Completely blocks my work, data loss, or security issue
- [ ] **High** - Major feature broken, but I can work around it
- [ ] **Medium** - Minor inconvenience, doesn't block my work
- [ ] **Low** - Cosmetic issue, nice-to-have fix
